name: "🚀 MVP — Core Modules"
about: "Phase 1: Core BOQ, Schedule, Cost, Document Control"
title: "MVP — Core Modules"
labels: ["mvp", "epic"]
body: |
  ## MVP Scope (6-9 months)

  ### Must Have
  - [ ] Project Management (WBS, milestones, portfolio)
  - [ ] BOQ Module (hierarchical + CBS dimension)
  - [ ] Schedule Management (Gantt, CPM, P6 import)
  - [ ] Cost Management (budget, EVM, cash flow)
  - [ ] Document Control (RFI, NCR, submittals)
  - [ ] User Management + RBAC
  - [ ] REST API + GraphQL
  - [ ] PostgreSQL + MinIO + Redis
  - [ ] Docker Compose deployment

  ### Technical Foundation
  - [ ] Monorepo setup (Nx/Turborepo)
  - [ ] NestJS backend scaffold
  - [ ] React + Next.js frontend scaffold
  - [ ] Database migrations (Flyway)
  - [ ] CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions)
  - [ ] Keycloak auth integration
